name: Jasper Carrott
bio: Jasper Carrott is an English comedian and presenter from Birmingham who rose to fame in the 1970s as a folk-club performer whose between-song banter gradually overtook the music. His observational stand-up and storytelling led to numerous television series and a UK Top 5 novelty single. He later co-created the spoof drama The Detectives and hosted the game show Golden Balls.

timeline.ev: Opens his folk club The Boggery in Solihull
Funky Moped reaches the UK Top 5
An Audience with Jasper Carrott airs
Carrotts Lib begins; later wins a BAFTA
The Detectives launches as a series
